calendar.matters:
Petition For Modification Of Irrevocable Trust By All Beneficiaries And Modification In Changed In Circusmtances
Off Calendar Feb-15-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Cynthia Lee for Candace Tom (Petitioner).

Ms. Lee stated that she could correct the notice, that all of the Children are adults, that Connor was 18 years old when he signed and informed the Court that Mr. Low (one of the Trustors) passed away in December. The Court granted the Petition for Modification of Irrevocable Trust By All Beneficiaries, etc. (subject to review of the order and receipt of the corrected proof of service).

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguer/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.
